{"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"system_unready: Description gives a strong PROBLEM (three named bead IDs, a concrete execution dir example, and the exact reviewer error string 'review-error: provider_empty: reviewer output: unparseable JSON verdict: empty input (raw output 0 bytes)') and a clear ROOT CAUSE (provider_empty is a transport failure but the review-group error path doesn't distinguish it from a genuine verdict) plus a specific PROPOSED FIX (retry N times, fall back to an alternate reviewer route, log the failed route). The quoted error string is grep-able and would let an executing agent locate the relevant code without a file:line pointer, so the bead is not ambiguous about what to build. However it falls short of the authoring rubric on several checkable points: no file:line evidence, AC criterion 4 describes test coverage conceptually but names no Test* function or go test -run filter, AC criterion 5 says 'Repo gates pass' instead of an explicit 'cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./\u003cpaths\u003e/...' command, and no parent/deps field is present in the bead at all. The label ac-quality:needs-refinement corroborates that this gap was already flagged. The five prior_attempts are all 'Claude TUI PTY closed before Stop hook; process exit code 143' with review_status=skipped — this is infrastructure/harness flakiness unrelated to the bead's content and does not indicate the bead itself is unready.","fingerprint":"322574031dede09beb02a2229b3cc2161b6e55856667c30ab90694ee113c63a5","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"system_unready","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.system_unready","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment","warning_fingerprint":"322574031dede09beb02a2229b3cc2161b6e55856667c30ab90694ee113c63a5"}

{"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"system_unready: The bead has a clear PROBLEM/ROOT CAUSE/PROPOSED FIX narrative naming the concrete symptom (provider_empty: unparseable JSON verdict, 0-byte reviewer output) and a well-scoped fix (retry then fallback route on transport-class reviewer failures, only park on genuine verdict failures) confined to one subsystem (pre-land review/worker). An agent can grep for provider_empty and the review-group error path to locate the code without operator hand-holding.
